prompt: Edit the source image to reflect the post-cell division state, similar to the reference image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the source image, to represent a complete post-cell division state. The edited image should depict two distinct daughter cells, each containing a well-defined nucleus, mirroring the morphological and internal component characteristics observed in image 2, the reference image. Specifically, transform the yellow chromosomal masses in image 1 into individual nuclei and adapt the surrounding cellular network to match the organized appearance and color scheme of image 2, maintaining a photorealistic microscopic quality.
objects: Yellow chromosomal masses (should not be present)
